name: quantcoder-plugin
description: Marketplace for the QuantCoder Claude Code plugin.

metadata.description: Claude Code/Codex Agent-native plugin wrapper around SL-Mar/quantcoder for research-paper to QuantConnect workflows, local QC linting, and optional QuantConnect validation/backtesting through MCP.
